metadata.name: beartype
requiresDist: langchain; (python_version < '3.14.0' and sys_platform != 'darwin' and platform_python_implementation != 'PyPy') and extra == 'dev'
numpy; (python_version < '3.15.0' and sys_platform != 'darwin' and platform_python_implementation != 'PyPy') and extra == 'dev'
langchain; (python_version < '3.14.0' and sys_platform != 'darwin' and platform_python_implementation != 'PyPy') and extra == 'test'
numpy; (python_version < '3.15.0' and sys_platform != 'darwin' and platform_python_implementation != 'PyPy') and extra == 'test'
langchain; (python_version < '3.14.0' and sys_platform != 'darwin' and platform_python_implementation != 'PyPy') and extra == 'test-tox'
numpy; (python_version < '3.15.0' and sys_platform != 'darwin' and platform_python_implementation != 'PyPy') and extra == 'test-tox'

metadata.name: checkov
metadata.author: bridgecrew
requiresDist: pyston-autoload==2.3.5; python_version < "3.11" and (sys_platform == "linux" or sys_platform == "darwin") and platform_machine == "x86_64" and implementation_name == "cpython"
pyston==2.3.5; python_version < "3.11" and (sys_platform == "linux" or sys_platform == "darwin") and platform_machine == "x86_64" and implementation_name == "cpython"
